history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, low-angle shot of two young people wearing novelty "Happy Birthday" cupcake-shaped glasses. The glasses are pink with colorful polka dots and glittery rims, featuring letters spelling out "HAPPY BIRTHDAY" in vibrant colors on headbands. The person in the foreground, on the left, has long dark hair and a pouty expression with their tongue slightly sticking out. The person on the right is partially visible, showing their nose and lips, also wearing the novelty glasses. In the background, a silver balloon shaped like the letter "B" is visible against a plain white wall. The lighting is warm and somewhat dim, creating a playful and celebratory mood. The overall style is candid and festive, capturing a moment of fun and excitement. The color palette is dominated by pink, with pops of yellow, green, red, and blue from the glasses' lettering, contrasted by the silver balloon and dark hair.
